cocktails.name: Bellini
instructions: Pour peach puree into the mixing glass with ice, add the Prosecco wine.
Stir gently and pour in a chilled flute glass.

variations.name: Puccini
variations.description: Made with fresh mandarin orange juice instead of peach purée.

variations.name: Rossini
variations.description: Made with fresh strawberry purée instead of peach purée.

variations.name: Tintoretto
variations.description: Made with fresh pomegranate juice instead of peach purée.

cocktails.name: Black Russian
instructions: Pour the ingredients into the old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes.
Stir gently.
cocktails.notes: WHITE RUSSIAN - Float fresh cream on the top and stir in slowly.

cocktails.name: Bloody Mary
instructions: Stir gently all the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice, pour into rocks glass.
cocktails.garnish: Celery, Lemon Wedge (Optional)
cocktails.notes: If requested served with ice, pour into highball glass.

cocktails.name: Caipirinha
instructions: Place lime and sugar into a double old fashioned glass and muddle gently.
Fill the glass with cracked ice and add Cachaça.
Stir gently to involve ingredients.

cocktails.name: Champagne Cocktail
instructions: Place the sugar cube with 2 dashes of bitters in a large Champagne glass, add the cognac.
Pour gently chilled Champagne.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with orange zest and maraschino cherry.

cocktails.name: Corpse Reviver #2
instructions: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice.
Shake well and strain in chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with orange zest

cocktails.name: Cosmopolitan
instructions: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake well and strain into a large cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a lemon twist.

cocktails.name: Cuba Libre
instructions: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with lime wedge.

cocktails.name: French 75
instructions: Pour all the ingredients, except Champagne, into a shaker.
Shake well and strain into a Champagne flute.
Top up with Champagne.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: French Connection
instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes.
Stir gently.

cocktails.name: Grasshopper
instructions: Pour all ingredients into shaker filled with ice.
Shake briskly for few seconds.
Strain into chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: N/A, optional mint leaf

cocktails.name: Hemingway Special
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake well and strain into a large cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Horse's Neck
instructions: Pour Cognac and ginger ale directly into a highball glass with ice cubes.
Stir gently.
If preferred, add dashes of Angostura Bitter.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a rind of one lemon spiral.

cocktails.name: Irish Coffee
instructions: Warm black coffee is poured into a pre-heated Irish coffee glass.
Whiskey and at least one teaspoon of sugar is added and stirred until dissolved.
Fresh thick chilled cream is carefully poured over the back of a spoon held just above the surface of the coffee.
The layer of cream will float on the coffee without mixing.
Plain sugar can be replaced with sugar syrup

cocktails.name: KIR
instructions: Pour Crème de Cassis into glass, top up with white wine.

variations.name: Kir Royal
variations.description: Use champagne (sparkling wine) instead of dry white wine.

cocktails.name: Long Island Ice Tea
instructions: Add all ingredients into a highball glass filled with ice.
Stir gently.
cocktails.garnish: Lemon Slice (Optional)

cocktails.name: Mai-Tai
instructions: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake and pour into a double rocks glass or a highball glass.
The Martinique molasses rum used by Trader Vic was not an Agricole rum but a type of “rummy” from molasses.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with pineapple spear, mint leaves, and lime peel.

cocktails.name: Margarita
instructions: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass
cocktails.garnish: Half salt rim (Optional)

cocktails.name: Mimosa
instructions: Pour orange juice into a flute glass and gently pour the sparkling wine.
Stir gently.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with an orange twist (optional).

cocktails.name: Mint Julep
instructions: In Julep Stainless Steel Cup gently muddle the mint with sugar and water.
Fill the glass with cracked ice, add the Bourbon and stir well until the cup frosts.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a mint sprig.

cocktails.name: Mojito
instructions: Mix mint springs with sugar and lime juice.
Add splash of soda water and fill the glass with ice.
Pour the rum and top with soda water.
Light stir to involve all ingredients.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with sprigs of mint and slice of lime.

cocktails.name: Moscow Mule
instructions: In a Mule Cup or rocks glass, combine the vodka and ginger beer.
Add lime juice and gently stir to involve all ingredients.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a lime slice

cocktails.name: Pina Colada
instructions: Blend all the ingredients with ice in an electric blender, pour into a large glass, and serve with straws.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a slice of pineapple with a cocktail cherry.
cocktails.notes: Historically a few drops of fresh lime juice were added to taste. 4 slices of fresh pineapple can be used instead of juice

cocktails.name: Pisco Sour
instructions: Add all ingredients into a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled goblet glass.
cocktails.garnish: Few dashes of Amargo bitters on top as an aromatic garnish.

cocktails.name: Sea Breeze
instructions: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with orange zest and cherry

cocktails.name: Sex on the Beach
instructions: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a half orange slice.

cocktails.name: Singapore Sling
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.
Shake well.
Strain into Hurricane glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with pineapple and maraschino cherry

cocktails.name: Tequila Sunrise
instructions: Pour tequila and orange juice directly into highball glass filled with ice cubes.
Add the grenadine syrup to create chromatic effect (sunrise), do not stir.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with half orange slice or an orange zest

cocktails.name: Vesper
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.
Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Lemon zest

cocktails.name: Zombie
instructions: Add all ingredients into an electric blender with 170 grams of cracked ice.
With pulse bottom blend for a few seconds.
Serve in a tall tumbler glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with mint leaves.
cocktails.notes: Donn's Mix: 2 parts of fresh yellow grapefruit and 1 part of cinnamon syrup

cocktails.name: Bee's Knees
instructions: Stir honey with lemon and orange juices until it dissolves, add gin and shake with ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Optionally garnish with a lemon or orange zest.

cocktails.name: Bramble
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker except the Crème de Mûre, shake well with ice, strain into chilled old fashioned glass filled with crushed ice, then pour the blackberry liqueur (Crème de Mûre) over the top of the drink, in a circular motion.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish optionally with a lemon slice and blackberries.

cocktails.name: Canchanchara
instructions: Mix honey with water and lime juice and spread the mixture on the bottom and sides of the glass.
Add cracked ice, and then the rum.
End by energetically stirring from bottom to top.
cocktails.garnish: Lime wedge.

cocktails.name: Dark ‘n' stormy
instructions: In a highball glass filled with ice pour the ginger beer and top floating with the Rum.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a lime wedge or slice.

cocktails.name: Espresso Martini
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Fernandito
instructions: Pour the Fernet Branca into a double old fashioned glass with ice, fill the glass up with Cola.
Gently stir.

cocktails.name: French Martini
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink.

cocktails.name: Illegal
instructions: Pour all ingredients into the shaker.
Shake vigorously with ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass, or “on the rocks” in a traditional clay or terracotta mug.

cocktails.name: Lemon drop Martini
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with sugar rim around the glass.

cocktails.name: Naked and Famous
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: New York Sour
instructions: Pour all ingredients into the shaker.
Shake vigorously with ice.
Strain into a chilled rocks glass filled with ice.
Float the wine on top.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with lemon or orange zest with cherry.

cocktails.name: Old Cuban
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker except the wine, shake well with ice, strain into chilled elegant cocktail glass.
Top up with the sparkling wine.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with mint springs.

cocktails.name: Paloma
instructions: Poor the tequila into a highball glass, squeeze the lime juice.
Add ice and salt, fill up pink grapefruit soda.
Stir gently.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a slice of lime.

cocktails.name: Paper Plane
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Penicillin
instructions: Muddle fresh ginger in a shaker and add the remaining ingredients, except for the Islay single malt whiskey.
Fill the shaker with ice and shake.
Double-strain into a chilled old fashioned glass with ice.
Float the single malt whisky on top.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with candied ginger.

cocktails.name: Russian Spring Punch
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker except the sparkling wine, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled tall tumbler glass filled with ice, and top up with sparkling wine.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with blackberries and optionally a lemon slice as well.

cocktails.name: Southside
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, double-strain into chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with mint springs.
cocktails.notes: If egg white is used shake vigorously.

cocktails.name: Spicy Fifty
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, double-strain into chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a red chili pepper

cocktails.name: Spritz
instructions: Build all ingredients into a wine glass filled with ice.
Stir gently.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a slice of orange.

variations.name: Campari Spritz
variations.description: Swap the Aperol for Campari for a more bitter profile.

variations.name: Cynar Spritz
variations.description: Swap the Aperol for Cynar (artichoke amaro).

variations.name: Select Spritz
variations.description: The Venetian original, made with Select instead of Aperol.

cocktails.name: Suffering Bastard
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker except the ginger beer, shake well with ice, Pour unstrained into a Collins glass or in the original S.
Bastard mug and top up with ginger beer.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with mint springs and optionally an orange slice as well.

cocktails.name: Tipperary
instructions: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a slice of orange.

cocktails.name: Tommy's Margarita
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled rocks glass filled with ice.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a lime slice.

cocktails.name: Trinidad Sour
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: VE.N.TO
instructions: Pour all ingredients into the shaker.
Shake vigorously with ice.
Strain into a chilled small tumbler glass filled with ice.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with lemon zest and white grapes.
cocktails.notes: If desired water can be replaced by chamomile infusion in the honey mix.

cocktails.name: Alexander
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.
Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Sprinkle fresh ground nutmeg on top.

cocktails.name: Americano
instructions: Mix the ingredients directly in an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes.
Add a splash of Soda Water.
Stir gently.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with half orange slice and a lemon zest.

cocktails.name: Angel Face
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.
Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Aviation
instructions: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Shake with cracked ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Optional Maraschino Cherry.

cocktails.name: Between the Sheets
instructions: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Boulevardier
instructions: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with orange zest, optionally a lemon zest.

cocktails.name: Brandy Crusta
instructions: Mix together all ingredients with ice cubes in a mixing glass and strain into prepared slim cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Rub a slice of orange (or lemon) around the rim of the glass and dip it in pulverized white sugar, so that the sugar will adhere to the edge of the glass. Carefully curling place the orange/lemon peel around the inside of the glass.

cocktails.name: Casino
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktails shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled rocks glass with ice.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with lemon zest and a maraschino cherry.

cocktails.name: Clover Club
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktails shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Fresh raspberries.

cocktails.name: Daiquiri
instructions: In a cocktail shaker add all ingredients.
Stir well to dissolve the sugar.
Add ice and shake.
Strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Dry Martini
instructions: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink, or garnish with green olives if requested.

cocktails.name: Gin Fizz
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice except soda water.
Pour into thin tall Tumbler glass , top with a splash soda water.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a lemon slice, optional lemon zest.

cocktails.name: Hanky Panky
instructions: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Orange zest.

cocktails.name: John Collins
instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into a highball filled with ice.
Stir gently.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a lemon slice and maraschino cherry.
cocktails.notes: Use ‘Old Tom' Gin for Tom Collins.

cocktails.name: Last word
instructions: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Shake with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Manhattan
instructions: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a cocktail cherry.

cocktails.name: Martinez
instructions: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Lemon zest.

cocktails.name: Mary Pickford
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Monkey Gland
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Negroni
instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into a chilled old fashioned glass filled with ice, Stir gently.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a half orange slice.

cocktails.name: Old Fashioned
instructions: Place sugar cube in old fashioned glass and saturate with bitter, add few dashes of plain water.
Muddle until dissolved.
Fill the glass with ice cubes and add whiskey.
Stir gently.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with an orange slice or zest, and a cocktail cherry.

cocktails.name: Paradise
instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Planter's Punch
instructions: Pour all ingredients directly in a small tumbler or a typical terracotta glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with orange zest.
cocktails.notes: Add dilution up to taste, it can be given by water, ice or fresh juices.

cocktails.name: Porto Flip
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Sprinkle with fresh ground nutmeg.

cocktails.name: Ramos Fizz
instructions: Pour all ingredients except soda water in a cocktail shaker with ice, Shake for two minutes, double strain in a glass, pour the drink back in the shaker, and hard shake without ice for one minute.
Strain into a highball glass, top up with soda.
cocktails.notes: The drink was invented by Henry Ramos in 1888, at his bar Meyer's Table d'Hôtel Internationale in New Orleans. The Ramos Fizz was originally shaken for 12 minutes by a crew of 30 bartenders who passed the shaker from one to another.

cocktails.name: Rusty Nail
instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice.
Stir gently.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with lemon zest.

cocktails.name: Sazerac
instructions: Rinse a chilled old-fashioned glass with the absinthe, add crushed ice and set it aside.
Stir the remaining ingredients over ice in a mixing glass.
Discard the ice and any excess absinthe from the prepared glass, strain the mixed drink into the glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with lemon zest.
cocktails.notes: The original recipe changed after the American Civil War, Rye Whiskey substituted Cognac as it became hard to obtain.

cocktails.name: Sidecar
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Stinger
instructions: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Optional mint leave.

cocktails.name: Tuxedo
instructions: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into chilled martini cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with cherry and lemon zest

cocktails.name: Vieux Carrè
instructions: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with orange zest and maraschino cherry.

cocktails.name: Whiskey Sour
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into cobbler glass.
If served “On the rocks”, strain ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with ice.
cocktails.garnish: Garnish with a half orange slice and maraschino cherry, optionally use orange zest.
cocktails.notes: If egg white is used shake little harder to release and incorporate the foam from the egg white.

cocktails.name: White Lady
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, shake well with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Remember the Maine
instructions: Rinse a coupe glass with the absinthe and discard.
Stir the remaining ingredients with ice.
Strain into the rinsed glass.
cocktails.garnish: Lemon zest

cocktails.name: Cardinale
instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
cocktails.garnish: Lemon zest

cocktails.name: Garibaldi
instructions: Build in a highball glass over ice.
Ideally use aerated (fluffed) orange juice.
cocktails.garnish: Orange wedge

cocktails.name: Rabo de Galo
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a rocks glass.
Add ice and stir briefly.
cocktails.garnish: Orange twist

cocktails.name: Chartreuse Swizzle
instructions: Add all ingredients to a tall glass with pebble ice.
Swizzle vigorously.
Top with more pebble ice.
cocktails.garnish: Mint sprig and grated nutmeg

cocktails.name: Don's Special Daiquiri
instructions: Flash-blend briefly with crushed ice.
Pour into a footed glass and top with crushed ice.
cocktails.garnish: Half a passion fruit

cocktails.name: Gin Basil Smash
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Double-strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Grand Margarita
instructions: Salt the rim of a rocks glass.
Shake with ice and strain over fresh ice.
cocktails.garnish: Lime slice

cocktails.name: IBA Tiki
instructions: Muddle the ginger.
Add the remaining ingredients and shake with ice.
Strain into a Tiki glass filled with pebble ice.
cocktails.garnish: Citrus and dehydrated pineapple slice

cocktails.name: Jungle Bird
instructions: Shake with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass over ice.
cocktails.garnish: Pineapple wedge

cocktails.name: Missionary's Downfall
instructions: Blend all ingredients with half a cup of crushed ice.
Serve in a large coupe.
cocktails.garnish: Mint sprig and pineapple slice

cocktails.name: Pisco Punch
instructions: Gently mash the cloves with the syrup.
Add everything except the wine and shake with ice.
Double-strain into a goblet.
Float the wine on top.

cocktails.name: Porn Star Martini
instructions: Shake with ice.
Double-strain into a chilled glass.
Serve with a side shot of Champagne.
cocktails.garnish: Passion fruit cup with sugar

cocktails.name: Sherry Cobbler
instructions: Shake with the citrus wheels and ice.
Strain into a julep cup packed with crushed ice.
cocktails.garnish: Fresh berries and citrus wheels; serve with straws

cocktails.name: Three Dots and a Dash
instructions: Flash-blend with crushed ice.
Pour into a footed glass and top with more crushed ice.
cocktails.garnish: Three cherries and a pineapple chunk

cocktails.name: Afterglow
instructions: Mix.
Serve over ice.

cocktails.name: Alice Cocktail
instructions: Shake well, strain into a large cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Aloha Fruit punch
instructions: Add 1/4 cup water to ginger root.
Boil 3 minutes.
Strain.
Add the liquid to the guava, lemon and pineapple juices.
Make a syrup of sugar and remaining water.
Cool.
Combine with juices and pineapple.
Chill throroughly.

cocktails.name: Apello
instructions: Stirr.
Grnish with maraschino cherry.

cocktails.name: Apple Berry Smoothie
instructions: Throw everything into a blender and liquify.

cocktails.name: Apple Karate
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Banana Cantaloupe Smoothie
instructions: Juice cantaloupe, pour juice into blender, add banana, and liquify.

cocktails.name: Banana Milk Shake
instructions: Blend very well, preferably in a household mixer.
Serve in a wine glass, garnish with whipped cream and a piece of banana.

cocktails.name: Banana Strawberry Shake
instructions: Blend all together in a blender until smooth.

cocktails.name: Banana Strawberry Shake Daiquiri
instructions: Blend all together in a blender until smooth.

cocktails.name: Bora Bora
instructions: Prepare in a blender or shaker, serve in a highball glass on the rocks.
Garnish with 1 slice of pineapple and one cherry.

cocktails.name: Castillian Hot Chocolate
instructions: Shift the cocoa and sugar together into a medium-sized saucepan.
Dissolve the cornstarch in the water, and stir into the cocoa and sugar until it is a smooth paste.
Begin heating the mixture, stirring it with a whisk, and gradually pour in the milk.
Continue stirring with the whisk as you bring the liquid to a simmer.
Allow the chocolate to simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring often, until it is thick, glossy and completely smooth.
Serve steaming hot in coffee mug.
Serves six.

cocktails.name: Chocolate Beverage
instructions: Boil milk in the top of a deep double boiler five minutes.
Remove from fire and add chocolate, mixed with the cinnamon, a little at a time, beating with molinillo or egg beater after each addition.
When the chocolate is thoroughly blended, heat to the boiling point.
Place over bottom of double boiler and add eggs, whipping constantly, until they are thoroughly blended and the mixture is frothing.
Serve in coffee mug.
Serves eight.

cocktails.name: Chocolate Drink
instructions: Melt the bar in a small amount of boiling water.
Add milk.
Cook over low heat, whipping gently (with a whisk, i would assume) until heated well.
Don't let it boil!
Serve in coffee mug.

cocktails.name: Coke and Drops
instructions: Take a glass, pour the Coke in the glass, then you take 7 drops of lemon juice.
Granish with a lemon slice on the rim of the glass.

cocktails.name: Cranberry Punch
instructions: Combine first four ingredients.
Stir until sugar is dissolved, chill.
Then add ginger ale just before serving.
Add ice ring to keep punch cold.

cocktails.name: Drinking Chocolate
instructions: Heat the cream and milk with the cinnamon and vanilla bean very slowly for 15-20 minutes. (If you don't have any beans add 1-2 tsp of vanilla after heating).
Remove the bean and cinnamon.
Add the chocolate.
Mix until fully melted.
Serve topped with some very dense fresh whipped cream.
Serves 1-2 depending upon how much of a glutton you are.
For a richer chocolate, use 4 oz of milk, 4 oz of cream, 4 oz of chocolate.
Serve in coffee mug.

cocktails.name: Egg Cream
instructions: Mix syrup and milk in a fountain glass.
Add soda water, serve with a straw.

cocktails.name: Frappé
instructions: Mix together.
Blend at highest blender speed for about 1 minute.
Pour into a glass and drink with a straw.
Notes: This works best if everything is cold (if you make fresh coffee, mix it with the milk and let it sit in the fridge for 1/2 hour.
If it is not frothy, add more milk, or even just some more milk powder.
The froth gradually turns to liquid at the bottom of the glass, so you will find that you can sit and drink this for about 1/2 hour, with more iced coffee continually appearing at the bottom.
Very refreshing.

cocktails.name: Fruit Cooler
instructions: Toss strawberries with sugar, and let sit overnight in refrigerator.
Cut lemon, reserve two slices.
Juice the rest.
Mix together the lemon juice, strawberries, apple juice, and soda water.
Add slices of lemon (decor, really).
In glasses, put ice cubes, and a slice of apple.
Pour drink in, and serve.

cocktails.name: Fruit Flip-Flop
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Fruit Shake
instructions: Blend til smooth.

cocktails.name: Grape lemon pineapple Smoothie
instructions: Throw everything into a blender and liquify.

cocktails.name: Holloween Punch
instructions: Take a bunch of grape juice and a bunch of fizzy stuff (club soda, ginger ale, lemonlime, whatever).
Mix them in a punch bowl.
Take orange sherbet and lime sherbet.
Scoop out scoops and float them in the punch, let them melt a little so that a nasty film spreads all over the top of the punch but there are still "bubbles" in it in the form of sherbet scoops.
Looks horrible, tastes just fine.

cocktails.name: Hot Chocolate to Die for
instructions: Melt the chocolate, butter and vanilla in a double boiler.
When just smooth stir in the cream.

cocktails.name: Iced Coffee
instructions: Mix together until coffee and sugar is dissolved.
Add milk.
Shake well.
Using a blender or milk shake maker produces a very foamy drink.
Serve in coffee mug.

cocktails.name: Just a Moonmint
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Kill the cold Smoothie
instructions: Juice ginger and lemon and add it to hot water.
You may add cardomom.

cocktails.name: Kiwi Papaya Smoothie
instructions: Throw everything into a blender and liquify.

cocktails.name: Lassi - A South Indian Drink
instructions: Blend in a blender for 3 seconds.
Lassi is one of the easiest things to make, and there are many ways of making it.
Basically, it is buttermilk (yoghurt whisked with water), and you can choose almost any consistency that you like, from the thinnest to the thickest.
Serve cold.

cocktails.name: Lassi - Mango
instructions: Put it all in a blender and pour over crushed ice.
You can also use other fruits like strawberries and bananas.

cocktails.name: Lassi - Sweet
instructions: Put all ingredients into a blender and blend until nice and frothy.
Serve chilled.

cocktails.name: Lassi Khara
instructions: Blend (frappe) in blender until frothy.
Add torn curry leaves and serve cold.

cocktails.name: Lassi Raita
instructions: Blend the yoghurt and ice cubes together, until the yoghurt becomes more liquid.
Add sugar to taste.
The lemon/lime is optional but it gives it a slightly tart taste.
Dash of salt.
Raita is also good for the summer.
Instead of having a traditional salad you can make raita instead.

cocktails.name: Lemouroudji
instructions: Juice the lemons.
Peel and grate the ginger.
Place the grated ginger and a liberal dash of the cayenne pepper into a piece of cheesecloth, and tie it into a knot.
Let soak in the water.
After 15 minutes or so, add the sugar, and the lemon juice.
Chill, and serve.

cocktails.name: Limeade
instructions: In a large glass, put the lime juice and sugar, and stir well.
Add cold seltzer water to fill.
Put the lime peels in the glass.
Drink.
Repeat until limes or soda run out.

cocktails.name: Mango Orange Smoothie
instructions: Throw everything into a blender and liquify.

cocktails.name: Masala Chai
instructions: Bring 2 cups of water to boil.
Add all the ingredients and boil again for about 15 seconds.
Let stand for a minute.
Warm milk in a pot.
Filter tea into cups.
Add milk and sugar.
That's IT.

cocktails.name: Melya
instructions: Brew espresso.
In a coffee mug, place 1 teaspoon of unsweetened powdered cocoa, then cover a teaspoon with honey and drizzle it into the cup.
Stir while the coffee brews, this is the fun part.
The cocoa seems to coat the honey without mixing, so you get a dusty, sticky mass that looks as though it will never mix.
Then all at once, presto!
It looks like dark chocolate sauce.
Pour hot espresso over the honey, stirring to dissolve.
Serve with cream.

cocktails.name: Microwave Hot Cocoa
instructions: Combine sugar, cocoa, salt and hot water in 1-quart micro-proof measuring cup (or coffee mug).
Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until boiling.
Add milk, sitr and microwave an additonal 1 1/2 to 2 minutes or until hot.
Stir in vanilla, blend well.

cocktails.name: Nuked Hot Chocolate
instructions: Mix with a bit of milk (1 oz or so) in coffee mug.
Nuke mug for about 30-50 seconds.
Stir until the heated cocoa dissolves.
Fill mug with milk.
Nuke for 1-2 minutes, depending on wattage and preferences as to burnt mouth parts.

cocktails.name: Orange Scented Hot Chocolate
instructions: Combine all ingredients in heavy medium saucepan.
Stir over low heat until chocolate melts.
Increase heat and bring just to a boil, stirring often.
Remove from heat and whisk untily frothy.
Return to heat and bring to boil again.
Remove from heat, whisk until frothy.
Repeat heating and whisking once again.
Discard orange peel. (Can be prepared 2 hours ahead.
Let stand at room temperature.
Before serving, bring just to boil, remove from heat and whisk until frothy.) Pour hot chocolate into coffee mugs.
Makes 2 servings.

cocktails.name: Pineapple Gingerale Smoothie
instructions: Throw everything into a blender and liquify.

cocktails.name: Spanish chocolate
instructions: Stir the milk with the chocolate and the cinnamon over low heat until the chocolate dissolves.
Add the eggs and beat the mixture until it becomes thick, taking care not to boil.
Serve in coffee mug.

cocktails.name: Spiced Peach Punch
instructions: Combine peach nectar, orange juice and brown sugar in a large saucepan.
Tie cinnamon and cloves in a small cheesecloth bag.
Drop into saucepan.
Heat slowly, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves.
Simmer 10 minutes.
Stir in lime juice.
Serve in hot mugs.

cocktails.name: Spiking coffee
instructions: Incidentally, a pinch of cinnamon is indeed a nice addition to coffee but true heaven is a cardamom seed.
Of course, you serve it in a coffee mug.

cocktails.name: Strawberry Lemonade
instructions: Throw everything into a blender and mix until fairly smooth.
Serve over ice.

cocktails.name: Strawberry Shivers
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Sweet Bananas
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Thai Coffee
instructions: Place the coffee and spices in the filter cone of your coffee maker.
Brew coffee as usual, let it cool.
In a tall glass, dissolve 1 or 2 teaspoons of sugar in an ounce of the coffee (it's easier to dissolve than if you put it right over ice).
Add 5-6 ice cubes and pour coffee to within about 1 inch of the top of the glass.
Rest a spoon on top of the coffee and slowly pour whipping cream into the spoon.
This will make the cream float on top of the coffee rather than dispersing into it right away.

cocktails.name: Thai Iced Coffee
instructions: Prepare a pot of coffee at a good European strength.
In the ground coffee, add 2 or 3 freshly ground cardamom pods.
Sweeten while hot, then cool quickly.
Serve in highball glass over ice, with cream.
To get the layered effect, place a spoon atop the coffee and pour the milk carefully into the spoon so that it floats on the top of the coffee.

cocktails.name: Thai Iced Tea
instructions: Combine Thai tea (i.e., the powder), boiling water, and sweetened condensed milk, stir until blended.
Pour into 2 tall glasses filled with ice cubes.
Garnish with mint leaves.
Makes 2 servings.

cocktails.name: Tomato Tang
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Yoghurt Cooler
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.
Note: Use lots of ice in this one - great on hot days!
To add ice: Remove the center of the cover while the blender is on - drop 3 or 4 ice cubs and blend until they're completely crushed.
